ai_welcome_hint: Tap a suggestion or type your own question
ai_welcome_subtitle: I can log food, adjust goals, analyze trends, and remember things about you.
aicoach_microphone_permission_is_needed_: Microphone permission is needed for voice input
coach_language_directive_fmt: IMPORTANT: The user's preferred language is %1$s. Respond in that language for all free-form text — greetings, questions, recommendations, analysis, summary text. Tool parameter VALUES should remain in the original language the user used (do not translate user input back to English). Internal tool parameter KEYS never change.
coach_suggestion_afternoon_remaining_cal: 📈 How many calories do I have left?
coach_suggestion_afternoon_snack: 🍪 What can I snack on that fits my macros?
coach_suggestion_almost_target: 🎯 Almost at my calorie target — what can I still eat?
coach_suggestion_consistency: 📈 How consistent has my intake been?
coach_suggestion_deficit_week: 📉 Am I in a good deficit this week?
coach_suggestion_high_fat: 🥑 My fat is high — what are some lower-fat options?
coach_suggestion_long_term_balance: 🧠 Am I balancing nutrition for the long term?
coach_suggestion_lunch_balanced: 🧁 Suggest a balanced lunch for my remaining macros
coach_suggestion_maintain_calorie: 📊 Am I maintaining my weight well?
coach_suggestion_meal_timing: ⏰ What should my meal timing look like for hypertrophy?
coach_suggestion_morning_sleep: 🌅 How did I sleep last night?
coach_suggestion_need_more_protein: 💪 I need more protein — suggest a high-protein option
coach_suggestion_over_target: ⚠️ I'm over my calorie target — what should I do?
coach_suggestion_protein_intake: 💪 Am I getting enough protein for muscle gain?
coach_suggestion_quick_protein: 💪 What's a quick way to hit my protein goal?
coach_suggestion_stay_full: 🤠 How can I stay full on fewer calories?
coach_suggestion_sustainable_rate: 📈 Is my rate of loss sustainable?
agenttoolcard_no_food_detected_try_a_cle: No food detected. Try a clearer photo.
dashboard_log_food_see_energy: Log food to see energy balance
dashboard_log_food_to_see_energy_balance: Log food to see energy balance
picks_empty_subtitle: Log a few meals at this hour to see suggestions here.

logfood_microphone_permission_is_needed_: Microphone permission is needed for voice input
logfood_no_favorites_yet_tap_the_heart_o: No favorites yet. Tap the heart on any food to add it here.

logfood_what_would_you_like_to_do: What would you like to do?

scanner_description_placeholder: Add some details (e.g. 'chicken breast with olive oil')

%1$s functionality is fully optimized offline!
Please search in '%2$s' tab to fetch Open Food Facts databases.
scanner_error_missing_api_key: Missing API Key. Please configure it in Settings.
scanner_error_no_food_detected: No food detected in image. Try a clearer angle.
calibration_subtitle_guess_fmt: %1$d of %2$d days logged. Your target is an initial estimate.
calibration_subtitle_learning_fmt: %1$d of %2$d days logged. Calibrating from real intake + weight trend.
calibration_subtitle_stabilizing_fmt: %1$d of %2$d days logged. Almost there — target is converging.
calibration_subtitle_stable_fmt: Target is stable — based on %1$d days of data.
calibration_body_guess: Daily weigh-ins and consistent logging improve accuracy quickly.
calibration_body_learning: The app is learning your real expenditure. Some target movement is expected.
calibration_body_stabilizing: Your expenditure estimate is sharpening. Keep logging consistently.
calibration_body_stable: Your target is now grounded in your actual data. It will still adapt slowly over time.
library_favorites_no_favorites_yet: No favorites yet. Tap the heart on any food to add it here.
timelineactionssheet_tile_highlight_hint: What appears on the right of each food tile
onboarding_eg_desk_job_walk_30_min_to_wo: e.g. Desk job, walk 30 min to work, lift 4x/week...
onboarding_fell_back_to_standard_activit: Fell back to standard activity target.
onboarding_no_profile_data_found_in_heal: No profile data found in Health Connect
onboarding_please_enter_a_gemini_api_key: Please enter a Gemini API key to enable AI.
onboarding_profile_data_pulled_from_heal: Profile data pulled from Health Connect
onboarding_where_do_i_find_my_api_key: Where do I find my API key?
settings_language_copy_missing_subtitle: Just the keys this language is missing (JSON, English placeholders)
settings_language_copy_missing_none: No missing keys — this language is fully translated
appearancesettings_light_theme_is_coming: Light theme is coming soon! MacroPhase currently runs in Dark theme only.
integrationssettings_manually_sync_all_l: Manually sync all logged foods to Health Connect
integrationssettings_sync_logged_foods_t: Sync logged foods to Health Connect automatically
notificationssettings_continue_processin: Continue processing and send notification when coach answers after closing app
notificationssettings_get_notified_when_: Get notified when your weekly trend analysis and new coach insights are compiled
notificationssettings_reminds_you_if_you: Reminds you if you have not logged food or are far under budget by evening
notificationssettings_triggered_daily_if: Triggered daily if weight is not logged yet
notificationssettings_triggered_on_your_: Triggered on your check-in day if check-in is pending
profilesettings_add_food_logs_and_weight: Add food logs and weight data for context
profilesettings_ignore_current_activity_: Ignore current activity level, estimate from scratch
profilesettings_this_will_permanently_cl: This will permanently clear all weight entries, food logs, and custom selections. This action cannot be undone.
settings_item_auto_check_desc: Check daily when opening this screen
settings_language_download_error_fmt: Could not download %1$s pack. Check your connection.
settings_language_follow_system_desc: Use the language set in your device settings
settings_language_subtitle: App language for menus, screens, and the AI coach
settings_language_contribute_subtitle: Long-press a language to help translate missing keys
settings_language_contribute_empty: All keys are translated — nothing to contribute.
settings_language_contribute_packs_empty: Tap to download the language pack first, then come back to contribute.
settings_language_contribute_no_translat: Add at least one translation to enable submit.
settings_language_contribute_submit_no_b: Could not open browser. JSON is copied — paste it into a new issue on github.com/MacroPhase/Languages.
settings_language_contribute_how_body:
1. Translate the missing strings in the boxes below.
2. Tap Copy JSON to grab the updated pack.
3. Tap Submit to open a GitHub issue with the JSON pre-filled.
4. A maintainer will review and merge your translations.
evening_reminder_empty: It's evening and you haven't logged any food yet. Don't forget to track your day!
evening_reminder_remaining_fmt: You have %1$d kcal remaining in your budget for today. Make sure to hit your targets!
notification_channel_adherence_desc: Daily reminders to log your weight
notification_channel_checkin_desc: Reminders for your weekly strategy check-in
notification_channel_coach_desc: Notifications when the AI Coach finishes generating a response
notification_channel_evening_desc: Evening reminders to help you log or hit your calorie budget
notification_channel_summary_desc: Weekly progress and coaching insights updates
notification_weight_log_body: Log your weight to keep your expenditure estimate accurate.
weekly_summary_fallback: Your weekly summary is ready. Open Phase to view your latest weight trend and nutrition insights.
weekly_summary_fmt: Weekly trend change: %1$s%2$s%3$s. Check your updated strategy to see your new targets.
memory_this_will_permanently_delete_all_: This will permanently delete all stored memories. Your coach will start fresh.
memory_your_coach_will_build_memories_as: Your coach will build memories as you interact
customcharts_no_expenditure_data_to_plot: No expenditure data to plot yet.
customcharts_no_weight_records_to_plot_y: No weight records to plot yet.
library_no_custom_match: No custom foods match your filter.
tool_summary_activity_days: ✓ Retrieved %1$d-day activity summary from Health Connect
tool_summary_body_comp_days: ✓ Retrieved %1$d-day body composition trends from Health Connect
tool_summary_failed_calorie_out_of_bound: ✗ Failed to update calorie target (value %1$d out of bounds)
tool_summary_failed_delete_none: ✗ Failed to delete last logged food (no logs found today)
tool_summary_failed_macro_range: ✗ Failed to update macro targets (each must be 5-80%)
tool_summary_failed_macro_sum: ✗ Failed to update macro targets (percentages sum to %1$.0f instead of 100)
tool_summary_history_days: ✓ Retrieved nutrition history for past %1$d days
tool_summary_multiple_matches_fmt: ✗ Multiple entries match '%1$s' on %2$s — which one?
tool_summary_no_log_match_fmt: ✗ No logged entry found matching '%1$s' on %2$s
tool_summary_recovery: ✓ Retrieved recovery metrics from Health Connect
tool_summary_updated_macros_fmt: ✓ Updated macro targets to %1$.0f%% P / %2$.0f%% C / %3$.0f%% F (%4$dg protein, %5$dg carbs, %6$dg fat per day)
tool_summary_weight_trend_days: ✓ Retrieved weight trend for past %1$d days
profilesettings_ai_description: Let the AI recalculate your exact PAL using current profile data + your inputs.
profilesettings_no_data_in_macrofactor: No data found in the MacroFactor export
updatestrategy_recalculation_note: Your program will be recalculated from today forward. Historical TDEE data is preserved.
updatestrategy_loss_rate_note: Based on your profile and selected loss rate.
updatestrategy_gain_rate_note: Based on your profile and selected gain rate.
updatestrategy_maintenance_note: Based on your profile and maintenance level.
updatestrategy_adjust_macros_note: Adjust your macronutrient ratios. Your goal, target weight, and rate stay as they are.
updatestrategy_low_fat_warning: Low fat intake may affect hormonal health. Consider keeping fat at 20%%+ of total energy.
updatestrategy_very_low_fat_warning: Very low fat intake. Hormonal health and vitamin absorption may be compromised. Consider keeping fat at 20%%+ of total energy.
updatestrategy_macro_help: Setting protein locks its value. Carbs absorb the remainder, and fat meets a recommended minimum of 20%%.
